Docs.param: The session target specifying either a model or agent.
Docs.summary: Creates a new using a session target (model or agent). The session is not automatically connected - call ConnectAsync() to connect.

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class Azure.AI.VoiceLive.VoiceLiveSession CreateSession(string model) cil managed
Public Overridable Function CreateSession (model As String) As VoiceLiveSession
abstract member CreateSession : string -> Azure.AI.VoiceLive.VoiceLiveSession override this.CreateSession : string -> Azure.AI.VoiceLive.VoiceLiveSession

Docs.param: The model to use for the session.
Docs.summary: Creates a new for real-time voice communication. The session is not automatically connected - call ConnectAsync() to connect.
Docs.remarks: The abstracts bidirectional communication between the caller and service, simultaneously sending and receiving WebSocket messages.

The cancellation token to use.

Optional session configuration to apply after connection.
The cancellation token to use.
